_comment: Example scope configs — copy and customize for your engagement

out_of_scope.notes: Production database server (203.0.113.250) is excluded. No DoS testing. No social engineering without separate approval.

rules_of_engagement: No social engineering without separate written approval
Stop all testing immediately if production impact is detected
Report critical/exploitable findings within 24 hours via encrypted email
All testing from AutoBoros.ai source IP only
No data exfiltration — demonstrate access only

out_of_scope.notes: 10.10.10.2 is the HTB gateway — do not attack

rules_of_engagement: CTF environment — all techniques permitted within platform rules
Do not attack other players or the platform infrastructure

engagement.authorization: Verbal + written authorization from Stefan Belan — ref: EVD-SEC-2026

out_of_scope.notes: Production site and live shop are strictly excluded. Staging only.

rules_of_engagement: Web application testing only — no infrastructure scanning
No automated brute force against login forms
